snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äì the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äì search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: BTS Performs 'Dynamite' | MTV Unplugged Presents: BTS

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: NASA‚ÄôS Perseverance Rover‚Äôs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASA‚Äôs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the rover‚Äôs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or ‚Äúhead‚Äù) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on Mars‚Äô Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Demi Lovato: Dancing with the Devil | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Featuring the exclusive first listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs title song to the powerful four-part documentary event, ‚ÄúDancing With the Devil.‚Äù

Premiering March 23, Demi Lovato holds nothing back in this powerful four part documentary series exploring every aspect that led to her nearly fatal overdose in 2018, and her awakenings in the aftermath. Director Michael D. id.title: Demi Lovato: Bermain-main dengan Bahaya | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Pemutaran perdana lagu Demi Lovato untuk dokumenter epik, "Bermain-main dengan Bahaya".

snippet.title: I'm Leaving YouTube
snippet.description:
üìù Follow Matt‚Äôs Newsletter: http://yestheory.com/newsletter/

After five and a half years as a host on this channel, I've decided to step away. 'Thank You' are the only two words I can muster. You, this community, have shown me nothing but endless love and support. The video goes into detail about my decision.

I'll be writing a short newsletter twice a month at www.yestheory.com/newsletter. This is the newsletter I wish my 19 year old self had when I first set out to live a fulfilling life. When you sign you'll receive lessons, tips and tricks from ten years of seeking discomfort.

I'll also be working on the book which will come out in November of this year...but more on that later.

Come follow along on the ride. We're only just getting started :)

Also, make sure to wait till the end to watch our EPIC season trailer. 

Love you all,

Matt

üé¨  Matt‚Äôs Best Moments: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3yw6EPr6jJM

üôèüèº Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
‚ö°Ô∏è SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY
‚Å∫ Yes Theory Plus: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTd7KzdwnFE3lm6LCfYDmUQ
üì∏ Instagram -  https://www.instagram.com/yestheory/
üê¶ Twitter - https://twitter.com/yestheory
üé¨  Facebook- https://www.facebook.com/yestheory/

If you want to join the Yes Fam Facebook group which is 100,000+ of our most engaged and badass community members, you can apply here: 
https://www.facebook.com/groups/yesfam/

üé• HOW WE MAKE OUR VIDEOS

üéµ Where we find our music:
1- Epidemic Sound. Amazing royalty free music for YouTube. Free 30 day trial here: http://share.epidemicsound.com/wFFbr‚Äã 

2- Musicbed. Amazing label-quality cinematic music. 30-day free trial here:
http://share.mscbd.fm/YesTheory‚Äã

3- Artlist. 2 Months Free High Quality Music: https://artlist.io/artlist-70446/?art‚Äã...

üéû Our b-roll and stock footage:

2 Months Free Stock Footage Videos: https://artgrid.io/Artgrid-114820?art‚Äã...

For an amazing b-roll and footage library, checkout: http://storyblocks.com/YesTheory‚Äã

üìà  Our Most Popular YouTube Videos
üé¨  Traveling to the least visited country in the world: https://youtu.be/ODuEl4oNae0
üé¨  Becoming Superhuman with Iceman Wim Hof: https://youtu.be/8cvhwquPqJ0
üé¨  We Helicopter Bungee Jumped with Will Smith: https://youtu.be/KSu6gRp7UBA

üéô The Yes Theory Podcast: https://spoti.fi/3sFdq6v

GET IN TOUCH
üåç Our website - https://www.yestheory.com 
üåç Advertise With Us - zack@onedayent.com 
 
Who are we? 
We believe that life‚Äôs greatest moments and deepest connections exist outside of your comfort zone.

Ask us a Question:
Tweet us @yestheory

I‚Äôm on an island
Even when you‚Äôre close
Can‚Äôt take the silence
I‚Äôd rather be alone
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: 6 MIN EVERYDAY STRETCH - for stiff muscles, flexibility & after your workout I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
a quick routine for every day ‚ô•Ô∏é it works perfectly as a cool down after ANY kind of workout! But of course, you can also do this in an office break, simply to relax, before bed or in the morning / Werbung 

We stretch our entire body! 6min = 12 exercises. Short but beneficial :)
- legs, hips & butt
- tummy 
- back & chest 
- spine 

I learned to love stretching sooooo much! I remember, about 6 months ago I definitely didn't stretch enough. This also impacted by training, since my muscles were feeling stiff and sore for longer, I started getting pain in my knees, etc. 
Now, I really look forward to a short stretch after a session. It's so relaxing, the music calms me down and you will quickly see improvements :)

Let's calm down & give our bodies some love in a different kind of way. 

__

‚ñ∏ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

‚ûû Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

‚ñ∏ my Pam App ‚ô•Ô∏é Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__

‚ñ∏ You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ‚ô•Ô∏é
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Charlotte Cardin ‚Äì Daddy 0:00 - 2:46
2. Faouzia & John Legend - Minefields 2:47 - 5:43
3. Birdy - Loneliness 5:44 - 7:43

__ 

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__

When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award¬Æ winner Emma Stone (‚ÄúLa La Land‚Äù) stars in Disney‚Äôs ‚ÄúCruella,‚Äù an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious ‚Äì and notoriously fashionable ‚Äì villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. ‚ÄúCruella,‚Äù which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estella‚Äôs flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar¬Æ winner Emma Thompson (‚ÄúHowards End,‚Äù ‚ÄúSense & Sensibility‚Äù). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
¬Ý
Disney‚Äôs ‚ÄúCruella‚Äù is directed by Craig Gillespie (‚ÄúI Tonya‚Äù) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (‚ÄúFreaky Friday‚Äù), Marc Platt (‚ÄúMary Poppins Returns‚Äù) and Kristin Burr (‚ÄúChristopher Robin‚Äù), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar¬Æ- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (‚ÄúMad Max: Fury Road,‚Äù ‚ÄúA Room with a View‚Äù) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on ‚ÄúCruella,‚Äù follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:¬Ýhttps://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:¬Ýhttps://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailers‚Äã
Hashtag: #Cruella

Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/GurSidhuInsta‚Äã
Facebook : https://facebook.com/gursidhuofficial‚Äã
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/igursidhu‚Äã
Twitter : https://twitter.com/gursidhuinsta


Lyrics

Vela shaam da , tu nikhri phire  
ni munda tahniya beh k sikhe tym chakna 
Tere karke ma nikhri phira ve 
ve changa lagge tenu chori takna  
lagga pta ve tu velly akvaunda 
 
Tere agge bolda e bolda e nai , pind raulaya ch pahila naam aunda 

Sukh rakhe baba, tu passnd jatt di
Lala pakki yaari , na pisha hatt di 
Ni mai ghro bahla aam , tera rang aa bdaami 
Mera nature aa shy , dilo bhari bethi haami 
 kahindi naaldi tu yaariya kamaunda  
 
Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai 
pind raulya ch pahila naam aunda 
Gall udni aa pakka tere mere ne yraane 
Akha teriya ne milne de labne bahaane 
Ditte jaane nai jwaab bade uthne swaal 
Rakhe jera je tu vadda ma v turu naal naal 
Kyo na  jassya gulaab tu fdaaunda 

Tere agge bolda e nai bolda e nai pind rolya ch pahila naam aunda 

Chakni jo teri ve , saroor jya chdaundi 
Dine gora rang , raati yaad aa staundi 
Rakhe galli vich geda , kaato dabb vich laake 
tere karke lyaya  billo bardar to jaake 
munda kava te nishane naio launda 
Tere agge bolda e nai pinda raulya ch pahila naam aunda.

snippet.title: UFC 259 Free Fight: Israel Adesanya vs Paulo Costa
snippet.description:
A stacked UFC 259 featuring three title fights is right around the corner on Saturday, March 6. Middleweight champion Israel Adesanya will move up a weight class to take on light heavyweight champion Jan Blachowicz in the main event. Watch Adesanya's last title defense against Paulo Costa at UFC 253 last year on Fight Island to get ready for UFC 259.

snippet.title: AWWW! Mary Jo Sings In Front Of Her Mom For The FIRST Time Ever! - American Idol 2021
snippet.description:
Mary Jo has come a long way since her 4th grade talent show yodeling days. Not only was this American Idol audition the first time Mary Jo has ‚Äúgenuinely performed for anyone‚Äù since 4th grade, but it was the first time she performed in front of her own mother! Thanks to Katy Perry, Lionel Richie and Luke Bryan, Mary Jo and her mother are able to share a very special, magical moment in the audition room. Watch here to see why Luke predicts Mary Jo is ‚Äútop 10‚Äù material for American Idol!



See more of American Idol 2021 on our official site: http://www.americanidol.com
Like American Idol on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AmericanIdol
Follow American Idol on Twitter: https://twitter.com/americanidol
Follow American Idol on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/americanidol/

AMERICAN IDOL, the iconic series that revolutionized the television landscape by pioneering the music competition genre, returns on ABC.

American Idol 2021

Helping to determine who America will ultimately vote for to become the next singing sensation are music industry forces and superstar judges Luke Bryan, Katy Perry and Lionel Richie. Emmy¬Æ Award-winning host and producer Ryan Seacrest continues as host of the beloved series, while multimedia personality Bobby Bones serves as the in-house mentor.

Cerca de 1,3 milh√£o de estrangeiros deixaram o pa√≠s entre o terceiro trimestre de 2019 e o mesmo per√≠odo de 2020, segundo dados do Centro de Excel√™ncia de Estat√≠sticas Econ√¥micas (ESCOE, na sigla em ingl√™s).

Uma fuga que se manifesta com for√ßa na capital inglesa: 700 mil estrangeiros deixaram a cidade, segundo estimativas feitas pelos economistas Jonathan Portes e Michael O'Connor, que cruzaram dados oficiais sobre emprego e popula√ß√£o.

snippet.title: O PEDIDO DE CASAMENTO DOS MEUS SONHOS
snippet.description:
Meu Deus! Ele fez o pedido de casamento dos meus sonhos!
Mikael organizou tudo de surpresa durante uma viagem nossa pra um ilha paradis√≠aca em Angra dos Reis, chamada Ilha da Gip√≥ia. 

"Voc√™ quer casar comigo"? Essas 3 palavrinhas m√°gicas sa√≠ram da boca dele quando chegamos a um cen√°rio rom√¢ntico na praia que parecia coisa de filme! 

Em segredo, Mikael comprou a alian√ßa e preparou tudo. Eles entraram em contato com a pousada Vitorino, com o restaurante Canto das Canoas, com a cerimonialista Luciane Brasil e com a Doce Angra Turismo e juntos eles proporcionaram um dia perfeito, com Mikael pedindo a minha m√£o em casamento e fechando com chave de ouro! 

E √© claro que EU DISSE SIM! Estamos oficialmente noivos!
E agora eu j√° to pensando no casamento ahaha

Eu t√¥ t√£o maravilhada que s√≥ posso agradecer muito o trabalho incr√≠vel de todos os envolvidos nesse sonho real:

snippet.title: 'I‚Äôm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ‚ñ∫ https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg
